sentence: Excuse me, could I ___ the menu, please?
explanationZh: could / would 是助動詞,後面要接「原形動詞」(see),不能接 V-ing 或過去式。「could I see」是有禮貌請對方的標準說法。

sentence: I'd like to ___ a table for two at seven o'clock.
explanationZh: would like to 後面接「原形動詞」,意思是「想要做某事」。在餐廳訂位的標準說法是 book a table。

sentence: Are you ready ___ order, or do you need more time?
explanationZh: be ready to + 原形動詞,表示「準備好去做某事」。be ready for 後面接「名詞」(例:ready for dinner),所以這裡選 to。

sentence: This soup is too salty. Could you ___ me the manager?
explanationZh: could 後面要用「原形動詞」(call),這是有禮貌請對方做事的說法。在餐廳客訴時,「叫經理過來」就是 call the manager。

sentence: How much ___ the bill, including the tip?
explanationZh: the bill(帳單)是單數可數名詞,搭配 how much 問金額時用單數 be 動詞 is。問「現在多少錢」用現在式,不用過去式 were。

sentence: I'll ___ the steak with mushroom sauce, please.
explanationZh: will 後面接「原形動詞」。在餐廳點餐時,「I'll have...」是最常用的點餐句型,意思是「我要點...」。

sentence: The waiter was very ___ and brought our food quickly.
explanationZh: be 動詞 was 後面需要「形容詞」來描述 waiter,friendly 是形容詞「友善的」。friend 是名詞,friendlier 是比較級需要 than。

sentence: Do you have ___ vegetarian dishes on the menu?
explanationZh: 在「疑問句」中問「有沒有」通常用 any,後面可接複數可數名詞(dishes)。some 多用於肯定句或預期答案是 yes 的請求。

sentence: We've been waiting ___ our food for thirty minutes.
explanationZh: wait for + 對象,表示「等候某人或某物」。等食物上桌是 wait for the food。wait to + 動詞才是「等著去做某事」。

sentence: Can we ___ the bill, please? We need to leave soon.
explanationZh: can 是助動詞,後面要接「原形動詞」(have)。在餐廳結帳時,「Can we have the bill」是請對方拿帳單來的標準說法。

sentence: Where can I ___ in for my flight to Tokyo?
explanationZh: can 後面要接「原形動詞」。check in 是片語動詞「報到、辦理登機」。在機場辦登機手續就是 check in for a flight。

sentence: Please ___ your laptop out of your bag for the security check.
explanationZh: 祈使句(命令或指示)用「動詞原形」開頭。在機場安檢時,工作人員要旅客拿出筆電,直接說 Please take...。

sentence: Your flight ___ from Gate 24 in 30 minutes.
explanationZh: 主詞 your flight 是「第三人稱單數」,動詞要加 -s,變成 leaves。時刻表上既定的時間用「現在簡單式」,不用 will。

sentence: Do you have anything ___ declare at customs?
explanationZh: anything 後面接 to + 原形動詞,表示「有什麼可以/需要做的」。海關通關時,「Do you have anything to declare?」是固定問句。

sentence: My luggage is too heavy. I need to ___ some items.
explanationZh: need to 後面接「原形動詞」,表示「需要做某事」。行李超重需要拿出一些東西,用 remove 或 take out。

sentence: Passengers ___ now boarding through Gate 12.
explanationZh: passengers 是複數名詞,搭配的 be 動詞要用 are。「are + V-ing」是現在進行式,表示「乘客正在登機」。

sentence: Excuse me, ___ is the gate for flight CI 100?
explanationZh: 問「在哪裡」用 where。詢問登機門的位置(gate is in a place),答案會是 Gate 24 之類的地點,所以用 where。

sentence: I ___ my passport at the hotel. What should I do?
explanationZh: 已經發生的「過去動作」(把護照忘在飯店)要用過去式。leave 的過去式是 left。現在式 leave 是表達習慣或事實。

sentence: Please fasten your seat belt ___ the plane is taking off.
explanationZh: while 後面接「子句」(主詞+動詞),意思是「當...的時候」。during 後面只接名詞(例:during takeoff),所以這裡用 while。

sentence: How long ___ the flight from Taipei to Seoul?
explanationZh: the flight(航程)是單數名詞,問「多久」(時間長度)用 be 動詞 is。How long does... 後面需要原形動詞,如 take。

sentence: Doctor, I've ___ a bad headache since yesterday.
explanationZh: I've 是 I have 的縮寫,後面接過去分詞變現在完成式。have 的過去分詞是 had。since yesterday(從昨天起)是現在完成式的典型時間。

sentence: I'd like to ___ an appointment with Dr. Lin, please.
explanationZh: 「預約看診」的固定搭配是 make an appointment。do 用於 do homework,take 用於 take medicine,都不符合預約的語意。

sentence: Take this medicine twice a day ___ meals.
explanationZh: 藥袋上常見的指示。after meals 意思是「飯後」,是吃藥時間的固定說法。其他選項在這裡語意不對(by meals 不存在)。

sentence: The doctor ___ me to drink more water and rest.
explanationZh: tell + 人 + to + 動詞,意思是「叫某人做某事」。said 後面要接 that 子句不能直接接人,所以用 told me to drink。

sentence: Please come back ___ a follow-up visit next week.
explanationZh: come back for + 名詞,表示「為了某目的回來」。回診是 come back for a follow-up。to + 原形動詞也可,但這裡 follow-up visit 是名詞,要用 for。

sentence: Does your insurance ___ the cost of this treatment?
explanationZh: Does 是助動詞,後面主詞接「動詞原形」(cover)。cover 在保險語境是「給付、涵蓋」的意思,固定用法。

sentence: I feel ___ today than I did yesterday — thank you, doctor.
explanationZh: 句尾有 than 表示「比較」,要用比較級。good 的比較級不規則變化是 better。best 是最高級,要搭配 the。

sentence: The nurse will ___ your blood pressure now.
explanationZh: 「量血壓」的固定搭配是 take someone's blood pressure。take 在這裡是「測量」的意思,如 take temperature(量體溫)也一樣。

sentence: If the pain ___ worse, please call us immediately.
explanationZh: 「條件句第一型」(if + 現在式, will + 原形)用於可能發生的未來。主詞 the pain 是第三人稱單數,動詞加 -s 變 gets。

sentence: Could you ___ me where the X-ray room is?
explanationZh: Could you 是有禮貌的請求,後面接「原形動詞」(tell)。Could you tell me where... 是禮貌問路、問位置的標準句型。

sentence: The meeting ___ at 10 a.m. tomorrow in the main conference room.
explanationZh: 表「既定的時間表」用現在簡單式。主詞 the meeting 是第三人稱單數,動詞加 -s 變 starts。雖然指未來,但時刻表概念用現在式。

sentence: I'm sorry, I can't make it. I have ___ deadline to finish today.
explanationZh: deadline 是單數可數名詞,d 是「子音」開頭發音,所以前面用 a 不用 an。語境是「我有一個截止日要趕」,不是特定的(the)。

sentence: Could you ___ me with this Excel file? I'm stuck.
explanationZh: Could you 是助動詞用法,後面接「原形動詞」(help)。help someone with something 表示「在某事上幫忙某人」,職場常用句型。

sentence: I will ___ you the report by the end of the day.
explanationZh: will 後面接「原形動詞」(send)。send someone something 是「寄某物給某人」。職場郵件常見句:I will send you the report。

sentence: The deadline ___ moved from Friday to Wednesday.
explanationZh: the deadline 是單數,搭配的是 has。has been + 過去分詞(moved)是「現在完成被動式」,表示截止日已經被移動(由別人決定)。

sentence: Please ___ everyone on this email about the schedule change.
explanationZh: copy someone on an email 是辦公室常用語,意思是「副本給某人」(也就是寄信時把對方加進來)。cc 是名詞副本欄,不當動詞單獨用。

sentence: I think we should ___ this issue in the next team meeting.
explanationZh: should 是助動詞,後面接「原形動詞」(discuss)。discuss 後面直接接受詞,不加 about(常見錯誤:discuss about)。

sentence: She is ___ the new project, so please direct your questions to her.
explanationZh: is + V-ing 是「現在進行式」,表示「正在進行」的動作。她正在帶領這個專案,用 is leading。

sentence: Don't forget ___ the document before sending it.
explanationZh: forget to + 原形動詞 表示「忘了去做某事」(該做但沒做)。forget V-ing 表示「忘了曾經做過」。寄出前要記得檢查,用 to check。

sentence: I've been working on this report ___ three hours.
explanationZh: for 後面接「時間長度」(three hours),since 後面接「時間起點」(yesterday, 9 a.m.)。「做了三個小時」用 for three hours。

sentence: Good evening. I'd like to ___ in. My name is Chen.
explanationZh: would like to 後面接「原形動詞」(check)。check in 是飯店辦理「入住」的固定片語動詞,進飯店第一句話就是這個。

sentence: Do you have a room ___ for tonight?
explanationZh: a room available 是「形容詞後置」修飾名詞,表示「有空房」。available 在這裡是形容詞「可用的」。availability 是名詞,不能修飾 room。

sentence: Could I ___ a wake-up call at 6 a.m., please?
explanationZh: Could I 是禮貌請求,後面接「原形動詞」(have)。have a wake-up call 是飯店請櫃台「叫起床電話」的固定說法。

sentence: The Wi-Fi in my room ___ working. Can you help?
explanationZh: the Wi-Fi 是單數主詞,搭配 is/isn't。isn't working 是「現在進行式」的否定,表示「現在沒有在運作」。

sentence: I'd like to order ___ room service, please.
explanationZh: room service 是「不可數名詞」,前面不加 a / an。要表示「一些」用 some。也可以說 order room service(不加冠詞),但這四個選項中 some 最自然。

sentence: Breakfast ___ from 6:30 to 10 a.m. in the main dining room.
explanationZh: 「早餐被供應」要用被動語態 is served。主動 serves 的話主詞要是「人」(例:They serve breakfast)。飯店告示常用被動式。

sentence: What time do I have to ___ out tomorrow?
explanationZh: have to + 原形動詞 表示「必須」。check out 是飯店「退房」的片語動詞,離開前要去櫃台 check out。

sentence: Excuse me, ___ I leave my luggage here until 4 p.m.?
explanationZh: may + 原形動詞 表示「請求允許」(可以...嗎)。比 can 更有禮貌。寄放行李的禮貌問法:May I leave my luggage here?

sentence: The room next to mine is too noisy. Could you ___ me to another room?
explanationZh: Could you 後面接「原形動詞」(move)。move someone to + 地點 表示「把某人轉移到」。飯店客訴換房就是這個句型。

sentence: Here ___ your key card and breakfast voucher. Enjoy your stay!
explanationZh: Here are + 複數名詞(your key card and breakfast voucher 是兩樣東西)。櫃台同時遞給客人多樣東西時用 are,單一物品才用 is。
